title: Overwhelming Ores Mod
description: This is a mod made because I felt like Minecraft did have enough ores and to express what I would do if I had the change to add some new ores
body:
![Logo of The Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28eadcbb78f8264f925ef058b9e435e655c58939.png)

This mod add 10 new minerals those are Aluminum, Nickel, Titanium, Tungsten, Cobalt, Salt, Frosite, Sandite, Leafite, & End-Ite.

There are also 3 Compounds which are mixtures of some of the materials.

The 3 compound are Steel made form mixing Iron, Copper, Aluminum, Nickel. Then Titanium Alloy which surprisingly is made with Titanium, Tungsten & Aluminum. Final Platinum which is a mix of it self & Amethyst

Most of these Materials get Tools, Weapons, Armour & some have decorative blocks.

There's also technically two new tool types in the mod but they're basically stronger and more expensive versions of other tools.

Also there is 3 biome and 3 structures those structures spawn in many biomes

There is one more thing I you need to know before jumping right in I would highly suggest downloading Roughly Enough Items it's not mandatory but I would highly suggest it will make you life easier.
